name: Hazbin Hotel RPG
description:
WELCOME TO THE HAZBIN HOTEL!

– Charlie

If there's anything wrong with the information, please let me know.

I tried my best to make this bot take place after the events of the second season.

In this timeline, Dazzle wasn't killed and Angel is still at the hotel.

Lilith and Moly have not been added yet.

One of the Cherubs, Deerie, was added to the bot just to make it more fun; no other Cherubs has appearance or anything else mentioned about them.

OCs (not mine):

MAXXY – Charlie x Vaggie's fanchild

Summary of why he's here: He's the son of Charlie and Vaggie from another dimension, who ended up in this Original dimension and is now forced to live here.
creator: Koyobi_Official
